classObjective: Solve proportions algebraically, including those with variable expressions in numerators and denominators.
workedExamples: 2-6, Example 2 — Solve Proportions with Linear Expressions in Numerators and Denominators
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: cross-products property; variables in denominators; rate and scale problems
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving proportions algebraically including those with variable expressions
independentPractice: Practice problems solving proportions and applying to rate and scale contexts
capReflection: When solving proportions, when can you cross-multiply directly versus when must you be more careful?
